---
name: Data correction
about: A specific number, candidate name, party, voter count, or source citation is incorrect
title: "[data] "
labels: data-fix
assignees: ''
---

### Where is the incorrect figure

* Page or file:    e.g. `/constituency/GBA-7`, or `data/raw/research/candidates_2026_known.csv`
* Field affected:  e.g. "2020 turnout", "Confirmed nominee for GBA-7", "Party allotted symbol"
* Currently shows: <what the dashboard or file says now>

### What it should say

* Correct value: <what the value should be>

### Source

Please cite a primary or reputable secondary source for the correction so
the change can be traced in `data/raw/scrape_manifest.csv`.

* Source URL:
* Publication or institution:
* Date the source was retrieved:
* Screenshot (optional but helpful):

### Notes

Any context about why this matters or how widespread the discrepancy is.
